title: Platereader Workflow with V. natriegens
author: Daniel Stukenberg
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.uy9exz6

steps.title: Aliquot 50 µL LBv2 in 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 50 µL LBv2 in 1.5 mL reaction tubes

steps.title: Transfer material from glycerol stock into these reaction tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer material from glycerol stock into these reaction tubes

steps.title: Prepare transparent 96 well plat with 190 µL LBv2
steps.instruction: Prepare transparent 96 well plat with 190 µL LBv2

steps.title: Use 10 µL of LBv2 with...
steps.instruction: Use 10 µL of LBv2 with cells from glycerol stock to inoculate the 96 well plate. (Carry out experiment with four technical replicates

steps.title: Incubate 96 well plate in a platereader (Protocol
steps.instruction: Incubate 96 well plate in a platereader (Protocol: Preculture) Preculture: 37 cycles 600 s cycle time Shaking: Double orbital, 500 rpm Protocols: OD + optional protocols OD600 (Absorbance): Wavelength: 600 nm Settling Time: 0.5 s No. of flashes: 30

steps.title: Dilute grown cultures 1:40 (195 µL...
steps.instruction: Dilute grown cultures 1:40 (195 µL LBv2 + 5 µL culture) in a sterile 96 well plate

steps.title: Apply Shaking protocol Shaking (Absorbance)
steps.instruction: Apply Shaking protocol Shaking (Absorbance): Shaking: Double Orbital, 300s, 700 rpm Measure OD600

steps.title: Dilute grown cultures 1:50 (196 µL...
steps.instruction: Dilute grown cultures 1:50 (196 µL LBv2 + 4 µL culture) in a black sterile 96 well plate

steps.title: Start protocol for measurement in the plate reader (Protocol
steps.instruction: Start protocol for measurement in the plate reader (Protocol: OD+Lux, OD+GFP, OD+RFP) OD + Lux 121 cycles 300 s cycle time Shaking: Double orbital, 500 rpm Protocols: OD + luminescence OD600 (Absorbance): Wavelength: 600 nm Settling Time: 0.5 s No. of flashes: 30 Luminescence: Gain: 4000 Measurement interval time: 1 s
